# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build project
        run: npm run build

      - name: Create artifact (e.g., zip build output)
        run: |
          zip -r build-output.zip build
      - name: Upload build artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: my-app-build
          path: build-output.zip

  deploy-to-staging:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: Staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: my-app-build
          path: ./artifacts
      - name: Unzip artifact
        run: unzip ./artifacts/build-output.zip -d ./deployed-app

      - name: Simulate deployment to Staging
        run: |
          echo "Deploying application to Staging environment..."
          ls -R ./deployed-app
          echo "Running staging deployment script..."
          # Replace with actual deployment commands, e.g., scp, rsync, kubectl apply
          # For demonstration, we'll just show the presence of files.
          echo "Deployment to Staging successful!"
          # Example: Call a staging-specific script
          # ./deployed-app/scripts/deploy_staging.sh

  deploy-to-production:
    needs: deploy-to-staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: Production
      url: https://production.example.com
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: my-app-build
          path: ./artifacts
      - name: Unzip artifact
        run: unzip ./artifacts/build-output.zip -d ./deployed-app

      - name: Simulate deployment to Production
        run: |
          echo "Deploying application to Production environment..."
          ls -R ./deployed-app
          echo "Running production deployment script..."
          # Replace with actual deployment commands
          echo "Deployment to Production successful!"
          # Example: Call a production-specific script
          # ./deployed-app/scripts/deploy_production.sh
